- `rotate-first-pass`: Updates the next node in the chain.

  - Effect: Updates `node-first-pass-next` to `?n2`, clears old `at` and `heading` of `?n2`, sets new `heading` of `?n2`.
- `rotate-first-pass-end`: Finishes the first pass when the end node is reached.
  - Precondition: `END-NODE ?n2`, `CONNECTED ?n1 ?n2`, `node-first-pass-next ?nstart ?r ?n1`, `at ?n2 ?n2x ?n2y`.

- `rotate-second-pass`: Sets the coordinates of the nodes.

  - Effect: Sets `at ?n2 ?n2x ?n2y`, updates `node-second-pass-next` to `?n2`.
- `rotate-second-pass-end`: Finishes the second pass.
  - Precondition: `END-NODE ?n`, `node-second-pass-next ?n`.
  - Effect: Clears `node-second-pass-next`, clears `rotating`.
